The '''Orbital Space Dock III''' was designed for ships over 300 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length, and was known to have been in [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] service since at least a few [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==Characteristics==
It featured numerous [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] and spacebarge hangars, and living quarters for its dock personnel. It provided repair bays for [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] up to 600 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length, with bays for other smaller vessels.

==History==
An Orbital Space Dock III was constructed and placed in orbit over the planet of [[Bacrana/Legends|Bacrana]] by the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==Sources==
